progress_note: Two cohorts completed; employer partners hired 40 percent of graduates within three months.
Outreach reached six rural districts, exceeding the target by a wide margin.
Retention held steady despite a funding gap mid-year; mentoring was the key factor.
Signed three new community partners; one pulled out late, slowing the final quarter.
Scholarship uptake was slower than planned until we simplified the application.
Participant satisfaction was high, but data collection lagged behind the schedule.
Met the enrollment goal early, so we added a second workshop series.
Employer feedback shaped a new module that improved the placement rate.
